outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative total GEX (-4.15B combined) indicates dealer short gamma regime - expect amplified price movements and volatility expansion on any directional move.
outlook.summary: Market trapped in short gamma regime with heavy put concentration. Three RESONANCE levels identified: 600 and 585 PUT walls (4+ expiries) and 630 CALL wall (3 expiries). Max Pain cluster at 605-606 acts as magnetic attractor just above spot. Bearish skew (1.35-1.48 ratio) confirms institutional hedging pressure. Expect volatility with upward bias toward Max Pain, but failure at 600 support triggers acceleration lower.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: 600 strike shows dominant Put OI across 4 expiries (40K+ 0DTE, 25K WEEKLY_1, 100K MONTHLY_1, 30K MONTHLY_2). Volume 167K in 0DTE confirms active defense. Negative GEX amplifies importance.
STRUCTURAL: 585 strike significant in 4 expiries (56K 0DTE, 60K WEEKLY_1, 36K MONTHLY_1, 17K MONTHLY_2). Deep support with high IV (31%+) indicates strong hedging interest.
CEILING: 630 CALL dominates in 3 expiries (22K WEEKLY_1, 49K MONTHLY_1, 22K MONTHLY_2). Above Gamma Flip 629.5 - dealers short calls will defend aggressively.
GRAVITY: Max Pain at 605-606 in 4 of 5 expiries. Only 0.13% from spot. MM hedging creates magnetic pull toward this level in short gamma environment.
WEEKLY ANCHOR: 595 is top Put OI in WEEKLY_1 (62,550) with significant MONTHLY_1 presence (33,450). Volume 58K WEEKLY_1 confirms institutional positioning.
DUAL PRESSURE: 610 has both Call OI (17K 0DTE, 25K MONTHLY_1) and Put OI (36K MONTHLY_1). Pin risk zone. High 0DTE call volume (79K) suggests breakout interest.
RESISTANCE CLUSTER: 620 CALL OI in 0DTE (15K) and MONTHLY_1 (31K). Also significant Put OI (31K MONTHLY_1) creates complex dealer dynamics.
MONTHLY SUPPORT: 590 PUT massive in MONTHLY_1 (101,564 - largest single OI). Also 19K MONTHLY_2. Institutional hedging anchor.
TRANSITION: WEEKLY_2 gamma flip at 629.5. Above this level dealers flip to long gamma, suppressing volatility. Below = volatility expansion.
0DTE ACTIVITY: 604 PUT shows extreme volume (92,934) vs OI (14,223). Volume/OI ratio 6.5x indicates heavy intraday positioning near spot.
DEEP SUPPORT: 575 PUT consistent across all expiries (26K 0DTE, 26K WEEKLY_1, 55K MONTHLY_1, 16K MONTHLY_2). Last line of defense before major breakdown.
